  • Overview
  • Tree
  • Index
  • Search
  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AbilityType
    Enumerates the two special ability types available to playable characters.
    Attackable
    Strategy interface for all attack types.
    BasePlayer
    Abstract base class for all playable characters.
    CatPlayer
    Cat character.
    CharacterSelectScene
    Scene where both players choose their character (Dog or Cat) before a match.
    Controller
    Central game-logic hub for one match.
    DogPlayer
    Dog character.
    EffectRenderer
    Draws particle-based visual effects for the three status effects: Burn, Freeze, and Wind.
    EndScene
    Post-match scene shown after a winner is determined.
    FireAttack
    Fire attack that deals 2 HP of immediate damage on hit.
    GamePlayScene
    Wires together all game subsystems and drives the main game loop for one match.
    GameRenderer
    Top-level renderer that orchestrates all per-frame drawing for a match.
    HandleInput
    Translates raw JavaFX input events into Controller calls.
    HudRenderer
    Draws the heads-up display (HUD) overlay on the game canvas.
    IceAttack
    Ice attack that deals 1 HP of immediate damage and freezes the target for one turn.
    Main
    JavaFX application entry point for AnimalWizard.
    NormalAttack
    Standard attack that deals exactly 1 HP of immediate damage.
    PhysicsUtils
    Stateless utility class for physics calculations used by Controller.
    Projectile
    Models a single projectile with a three-state lifecycle: IDLE → AIMING → FLYING → IDLE.
    Projectile.State
    Lifecycle states.
    ProjectileRenderer
    Draws the projectile in its two active states: AIMING and FLYING.
    SkillButtonRenderer
    Draws the five skill-selection circles for both players at the top of the canvas.
    SoundManager
    Manages all game audio: background music (BGM) and looping sound effects (SFX).
    StartScene
    The main-menu scene shown when the application starts.
    StatusManager
    Manages the three time-limited status effects: Burn, Freeze, and Wind.
    WindAttack
    Wind attack that deals 1 HP of immediate damage and causes the target to oscillate horizontally for StatusManager.WIND_TURNS turn(s), making them harder to hit.
